Hello I am E-Vex, I am studying computer science at the CNAM university.
Now I am working on a packet analyzer project called : ‚ÄúVexor‚Äù.
Today I continued refactoring a module called packet_reader.c working on the Single Responsibility Principle (SRP), I created a new directory named protocol_parser/ containing dedicated files for each layer
data_link_layer: For parsing the data link layer.
network_layer: For handling the network layer (IPv4 and beyond).
transport_layer: For parsing protocols like TCP.
payload_handler: For processing the actual data carried by the packet.
Programming isn‚Äôt just about writing code that works; it‚Äôs about writing code that is maintainable and scalable. Today, I feel like my project has become much more viable.
